objects.description: One sentence describing what this component produces.
objects.summary: One sentence describing what this component produces.

objects.description: Generates a hex-head bolt with specified size and length.
objects.summary: Generates a hex-head bolt with specified size and length.

variables.name: radius_name
variables.description: Bolt size designation, e.g. m5, m6.

objects.description: Returns the raw OpenSCAD source for a Gridfinity base tile.
objects.summary: Returns the raw OpenSCAD source for a Gridfinity base tile.

objects.description: Renders a cylinder (solid or cutout) sized to an OOBB grid position.
objects.summary: Renders a cylinder (solid or cutout) sized to an OOBB grid position.

variables.name: depth
variables.description: Z depth (height) of the cylinder in mm.

variables.name: extra_mm
variables.description: Adds 1/15 to width/height for clearance fit.

variables.name: zz
variables.description: Z anchor point: bottom, top, middle.

objects.description: Flanged coupler with shaft holes and flange M3/M8 cutouts, wrapped in a rotation object.
objects.summary: Flanged coupler with shaft holes and flange M3/M8 cutouts, wrapped in a rotation object.

variables.name: part
variables.description: Which part to generate: all, only_holes, shaft.

objects.description: Cube geometry primitive; delegates to oobb_cube_center.
objects.summary: Cube geometry primitive; delegates to oobb_cube_center.

variables.name: zz
variables.description: Z anchor point: bottom, top, center/middle.

objects.description: Center-aligned cube that shifts pos by -size/2 on x/y before passing to OpenSCAD.
objects.summary: Center-aligned cube that shifts pos by -size/2 on x/y before passing to OpenSCAD.

variables.name: zz
variables.description: Z anchor point: bottom, top, center/middle.

objects.description: Cube with full rotation-object support and mode filtering.
objects.summary: Cube with full rotation-object support and mode filtering.

variables.name: zz
variables.description: Z anchor point: bottom, top, center/middle.

objects.description: Cylinder geometry across all render modes, supporting named or explicit radius and z-centering.
objects.summary: Cylinder geometry across all render modes, supporting named or explicit radius and z-centering.

variables.name: zz
variables.description: Z anchor point: center, bottom, top.

objects.description: Hollow cylinder (positive outer minus negative inner) wrapped in a rotation object.
objects.summary: Hollow cylinder (positive outer minus negative inner) wrapped in a rotation object.

objects.description: Cylindrical screw hole for all render modes, resolved from a named or explicit radius.
objects.summary: Cylindrical screw hole for all render modes, resolved from a named or explicit radius.

variables.name: radius_name
variables.description: Named radius key, e.g. m3, m6.  Takes priority over radius.

variables.name: radius
variables.description: Explicit radius in mm, used when radius_name is empty.

variables.name: mode
variables.description: Render modes to emit: laser, 3dpr, true.

objects.description: Cylindrical hole with rotation-object support, mode filtering, and named/explicit radius.
objects.summary: Cylindrical hole with rotation-object support, mode filtering, and named/explicit radius.

objects.description: Places OOBB-grid-aligned screw holes across a rectangular or circular area using named hole patterns.
objects.summary: Places OOBB-grid-aligned screw holes across a rectangular or circular area using named hole patterns.

variables.name: holes
variables.description: Hole pattern(s): all, perimeter, perimeter_miss_middle, u, top, bottom, left, right, corners, single, missing_middle, just_middle, circle.

variables.name: radius_name
variables.description: Named radius key, e.g. m6, m3.

variables.name: size
variables.description: Grid spacing scale: oobb or oobe.

variables.name: both_holes
variables.description: Also add matching oobe half-grid holes.

variables.name: circle
variables.description: Filter holes to lie inside a circle boundary.

variables.name: diameter_clearance
variables.description: Clearance from circle edge (mm) when circle=True.

variables.name: diameter_center_clearance
variables.description: Minimum distance from centre to include hole (mm).

objects.description: Hexagonal nut pocket with optional through-hole, overhang, and clearance, across all render modes.
objects.summary: Hexagonal nut pocket with optional through-hole, overhang, and clearance, across all render modes.

variables.name: radius_name
variables.description: Named radius key, e.g. m3, m6.

variables.name: hole
variables.description: Include a through-hole below the nut.

variables.name: extra_clearance
variables.description: Extra mm added to side clearance height.

objects.description: OOBB grid-sized plate (cylinder for 1×1, rounded rectangle otherwise) with optional hole pattern.
objects.summary: OOBB grid-sized plate (cylinder for 1×1, rounded rectangle otherwise) with optional hole pattern.

variables.name: extra_mm
variables.description: Adds 1/15 to size for clearance fit.

objects.description: Helper that extracts and returns a [rx,ry,rz] rotation list from kwargs.
objects.summary: Helper that extracts and returns a [rx,ry,rz] rotation list from kwargs.

variables.name: rot
variables.description: Explicit [rx,ry,rz] rotation list; returned directly if present.

objects.name_long: OOBB Geometry Primitives: Hollow Rounded Rectangle

objects.summary: Hollow rounded rectangle (positive outer minus negative inner wall) wrapped in a rotation object.

variables.name: wall_thickness
variables.description: Wall thickness from outer to inner.

objects.name_long: OOBB Geometry Primitives: Rounded Rectangle (Rounded Edges)

objects.summary: Rounded rectangle with rounded top and bottom edges (sphere-swept corners) wrapped in a rotation object.

variables.name: radius
variables.description: Corner radius of the base shape.

variables.name: radius_name

variables.description: Screw head style: socket_cap, countersunk, self_tapping.
